J2910 Major Surgery - GI Tract/Abdominal Contents CHAR 1 Involving the gastrointestinal tract or abdominal contents from the esophagus to the anus, the biliary tree, gall bladder, liver, pancreas, or spleen - open or laparoscopic (including creation or removal of ostomies or percutaneous feeding tubes, or hernia repair).
795 J2920_MAJ_SRGRY_ENDOCRINE_IND J2920_MAJ_SRGRY_ENDOCRINE_IND J2920 Major Surgery - Endocrine Organs CHAR 1 Involving the endocrine organs (such as thyroid, parathyroid),
